channel.title: Puzzles on Maya Sarangan
channel.description: Recent content in Puzzles on Maya Sarangan

item.title: When Lines Just Touch: The Secret of Tangents
item.description:
I was watching the movie Aladdin when my dad walked in and said “Let’s do something tangential to watching the movie!”. I asked, “what is a tangent?”. After a short session on tangents I ended up with this problem.

Here is the problem:

AB = 9, BC = 12, and triangle ABC is a right-angled triangle. The two circles have the same area. Find the combined area of the 2 circles.

item.title: Shakuntala Devi - A week of Puzzles
item.description:
“Math — it’s a puzzle. I love figuring out puzzles.” — said Maya Lin.

There have been many brilliant women who made history in mathematics, and Shakuntala Devi was one of them. She was a mathematician and writer who amazed the world with her mental calculations. She once solved the 23rd root of a 201-digit number in just 50 seconds, and even multiplied two 13-digit numbers faster than a computer!
